title: platystachys parviflora
intro: Platystachys parviflora, also known as the Thai lemongrass, is a tropical plant native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its citrus-scented leaves and stems. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Platystachys parviflora include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote a sense of relaxation.
